paper_title: An Efficient Sparse Hardware Accelerator for Spike-Driven Transformer
main_contributions: Novel spike redundancy elimination computation method to fully utilize sparsity in Spike-driven Transformer
Low-complexity spike encoding and computing units to optimize multiple types of spiking computations
Hardware accelerator implementation on Xilinx Virtex Ultrascale FPGA
key_techniques: Binary nature of SNNs for simple addition and comparison
focus_areas: Optimizing spiking computations by exploiting the binary nature of SNNs
Considering dual spike inputs of self-attention
Reducing hardware costs with lower power consumption and processing latency
title: An Efficient Sparse Hardware Accelerator for Spike-Driven Transformer
